Items.Title: Argentina vs Algeria: Match Preview, Predicted Lineups and More
Items.Description: The wait is over for the defending world champions as Argentina kicks off its 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign in Group J against an in-form Algeria side. Taking place at the Kansas City Stadium, Lionel Scaloni’s men begin their quest to become only the third nation in history to retain the global crown. Meanwhile, Vladimir …
